_comment: Archetype template: narrative / TTRPG / story-engine project. Combines generic discipline + local LLM orchestration (Ollama tiers) + the Aether-specific plugin + Windows tooling. Drop into the project's .claude/settings.local.json.
_recommended_for: any narrative/story-engine work that uses Ollama for prose generation
creative-writing tools where local LLM cost matters more than cloud SOTA
